overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk nightclub in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player character walks from a narrow red-lit corridor into a large industrial dance club with vibrant neon lighting, navigating through crowds of dancing NPCs toward a corner seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow entrance corridor with red neon lighting

events.description: approaching the bright red neon doorway at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow corridor toward a neon-lit doorway

entered.detail: doorway frame illuminated with intense red neon lights marking the entrance
metal handrail running along the left wall of the corridor
vertical red neon light tubes mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The video opens in a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light. The camera moves forward toward a glowing red doorway, with metal handrails and vertical neon tubes visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hallway with posters and seating

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into a wider entry hallway with posters on walls
passing by a person seated on a bench against the left wall

agents.ego_description: moving through the entry hallway past illuminated posters and a seated patron

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: illuminated poster with text 'wide open' showing two figures
poster featuring a woman in a red dress
wall covered in graffiti and street art
bench with a person sitting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the corridor into a wider hallway featuring glowing posters including one labeled 'wide open', graffiti-covered walls, and a person sitting on a bench to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor with DJ booth and suspended cages

events.description: entering the main club space revealing the dance floor and DJ booth
turning slightly to navigate through the dancing crowd

agents.ego_description: walking onto the dance floor and moving through the crowd toward the central DJ booth

notable_agents.action: dancer moving energetically with arms raised in front of the DJ booth

entered.detail: elevated DJ booth with equipment and signage in the center of the club
metal cage suspended from ceiling with a person inside performing
horizontal blue neon light strips running along the bar counter
exposed industrial metal framework and scaffolding structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a large industrial nightclub with a central DJ booth, suspended cages with performers, and crowds dancing under red and blue neon lights. The camera moves through the dancing crowd toward the center of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: dance floor and bar area navigation

events.description: turning left toward the bar counter while navigating through dancers
passing behind dancing crowd members near the bar

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd toward the left side bar area, weaving between dancers

entered.detail: long bar counter with bottles and blue neon lighting underneath
blue neon light strips embedded in the floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves left toward the bar area, passing through the dancing crowd. The DJ booth recedes into the background while the blue-lit bar counter becomes prominent on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner seating area with booth and table

events.description: slowing down and approaching the corner seating area
approaching seated individuals at the corner table with interaction prompt appearing

agents.ego_description: approaching a corner booth where two people are seated at a table with drinks and bottles

notable_agents.action: woman seated at the corner table looking toward the camera
person slumped over at the table with bottles scattered around

entered.detail: upholstered booth seating in the corner of the club
round table with multiple bottles and drinks on it
large industrial metal support pillar with cross bracing

segments.scene_description: The camera slows down and approaches a quiet corner seating area with a round table covered in bottles. Two people are seated in the booth—one alert and looking toward the camera, the other slumped over—as the camera stops near the table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, red-lit corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched chaos of an industrial nightclub. It begins by moving forward through a narrow passage lined with vertical neon tubes and metal handrails toward a glowing red doorway. As the camera exits the corridor, the space widens into a graffiti-covered hallway featuring glowing posters and a lone figure on a bench before opening fully into a massive dance floor. The scene then shifts into a sea of dancing crowds under flashing red and blue lights, passing beneath suspended performer cages and moving away from the central DJ booth toward a prominent blue-lit bar. Finally, the camera weaves through the crowd and slows down as it approaches a quiet corner booth, coming to a stop at a bottle-strewn table where two people sit in the dim light.
